Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All parameters are within normal limits except for mildly elevated HbA1c (6.1%), indicating prediabetes, and slightly high HDL cholesterol (63.1 mg/dL), which is generally protective. Renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile are otherwise unremarkable. Recommend monitoring glycemic control and lifestyle modification to prevent progression to diabetes.
